title: The hidden system behind every Renaissance trial - Ada Palmer
summary: Dwarkesh Patel interviews Ada Palmer on hidden systems underlying Renaissance trials. The discussion explores institutional and procedural mechanisms that shaped legal processes during the Renaissance period.
writeup: Dwarkesh Patel interviews historian Ada Palmer about the institutional and procedural mechanisms that structured legal trials during the Renaissance. The conversation focuses on the systems operating beneath the surface of these trials, examining how procedure shaped the way legal processes unfolded. The takeaway is an account of Renaissance justice as the product of underlying institutional design rather than isolated cases.
